name_en: P Sunset Crocodile Edition, embossed crocodile effect on calfskin, scales are slightly raised, very fragile, please handle with care. Calfskin was used for better effect, though cowhide would be more durable. Authentic versions are also made of calfskin. Limited release in designated areas. Size 22x16x9cm, Code 441971
